digest.greeting: Jean, today had real movement even though the dashboard-hidden items stayed out of the EOD sections. You sent the Co-Counsel scoping recap, moved the PMs Workshop onto the team calendar, and got confirmation that the Incident Response survey is scheduled for tomorrow at 10:00 AM. A few next steps are crisp for Wednesday: Jhara's Venn path, Isaac's interview, and the Salesforce/CoE follow-ups.

items.label: Co-Counsel scoping recap sent
items.detail: Jean replied to Eugenia and Sara with the June 1 scoping-call recap for the Nationwide Co-Counsel Network, including scope, current status, and the need for Legal confirmation before formal kickoff.

items.label: PMs Workshop invite sent
items.detail: Jean sent the PMs Workshop invite to Jhara, Yuri, and Mar with the purpose of discussing project-management capability improvements, areas for improvement, and PM wins.

items.label: Incident Response survey launch confirmed
items.detail: Nikki Adkins confirmed by email that the Incident Response survey is scheduled to go out Wednesday, June 3 at 10:00 AM.

items.label: Jhara's Venn setup escalation sent to Drew
items.detail: Jean messaged Drew Wittman asking whether Jhara's new ticket could be prioritized because Venn installed on her Mac but setup still was not working.

items.label: KPIs - confirm final approval
items.detail: Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling. Confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this out.

items.label: Confirm Jhara's Venn setup priority path
items.detail: Jean escalated the Mac setup issue to Drew today. Confirm the ticket is moving and whether stakeholders need a status update.

items.label: Reply to Eugenia on Co-Counsel PM assignment
items.detail: After Jean sent the Co-Counsel scoping recap, Eugenia asked whether Yuri will be assigned to it. Reply or align with Sara before confirming ownership.

items.label: Review Isaac Gomez Ventura interview materials
items.detail: Project Coordinator interview is Wednesday, June 3 at 4:00 PM EDT with Eugenia Barragan and Jean. Review candidate profile, resume, and cover letter before the interview.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE guide
items.detail: Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revision del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the rest.

items.label: CoE Announcement draft - incorporate remaining feedback
items.detail: Eugenia replied today with comments on the CoE announcement, including clarifying who contacts requesters for each path and whether intake escalation should route through TLs. Decide what to incorporate before the announcement is finalized.

items.label: Complete Nadia's project affected-areas request
items.detail: Completar la solicitud de Nadia Wilson sobre las areas afectadas en los proyectos del EPMO. Wednesday's Salesforce Program Overview can support this.

items.label: Write to Chelsea and Lucia - Incident Response follow-ups
items.detail: Hacer follow-up con Chelsea y Lucia sobre los pendientes del proceso de Incident Response. The survey launch is scheduled, but the remaining process follow-ups still need closure.

items.label: Incident Response survey is scheduled for June 3 at 10:00 AM
items.detail: Nikki Adkins confirmed the survey is scheduled to go out tomorrow at 10:00 AM.

items.label: Co-Counsel project waits on Legal confirmation before kickoff
items.detail: Jean's Co-Counsel recap stated that the project is waiting on Legal confirmation before assigning a dedicated PM and scheduling formal launch alignment.

items.label: TRACE touchpoint
items.detail: Recurring 15-minute touchpoint with Yuri Almeida.

items.label: Incident Response survey launch
items.detail: Nikki Adkins confirmed the survey is scheduled to go out at 10:00 AM.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Recurring 1:1 with David Molano.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Good slot for KPI closeout, CoE announcement feedback, and Co-Counsel PM ownership alignment.

items.label: Salesforce Program Overview - Intake Project Dependencies
items.detail: Nadia Wilson's meeting to review Sales Cloud and Revenue Cloud impact areas and dependencies with EPMO stakeholders.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Operational updates, lessons learned, celebrations, and EPMO topics with Sara Watson and the broader EPMO group.

items.label: Interview - Isaac Gomez Ventura
items.detail: Project Coordinator interview with Eugenia Barragan and Jean. Review candidate materials before the meeting.
